name: a user configuration that extends the standard profile and sets a rule to off disables that rule at enforcement (the single-config layering)
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf 'name: my
extends:
  - standard
rules:
  g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile ctp.config.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'disabled=1' e.txt && echo config-extends-and-disables 1>&2
